title: Royalty Hook
description: A safety-bounded hook for passing contribution graph references to downstream value-circulation, attribution review, royalty analysis, or governance audit systems without deciding payment, ownership, or legal attribution.

schema_version.description: The schema version of this Royalty Hook.

hook_id.description: A non-reversible identifier for this royalty hook.

hook_type.description: The type of downstream bridge represented by this hook.

source_graph_ref.description: Reference to the Source Contribution Graph that this hook is attached to.

graph_id.description: Identifier of the referenced Source Contribution Graph.

graph_hash.description: Integrity hash of the referenced Source Contribution Graph.

graph_schema_version.description: Optional schema version of the referenced Source Contribution Graph.

eligibility.description: Eligibility signals describing whether the referenced contribution graph may be passed to downstream review or analysis systems.

eligible_for_review.description: Whether this hook is eligible for human or governance review.

eligible_for_royalty_system.description: Whether this hook may be passed to a downstream royalty analysis system. This does not authorize payment.

eligible_for_public_attribution.description: Whether this hook may be considered for public attribution review. This does not decide public attribution.

confidence_level.description: Broad confidence level for the hook eligibility signals.

review.description: Review status and review requirement for this hook.

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required before downstream action.

review_reason.description: Reason why review is required or recommended.

review_status.description: Current review status of the hook.

allowed_downstream_use.description: Allowed downstream use categories for this hook. These categories do not authorize automatic payment or legal attribution.

prohibited_downstream_use.description: Explicitly prohibited downstream uses for this hook.

policy_boundary.description: Safety and scope boundary for this Royalty Hook.

payment_decision_included.description: Must be false. This hook must not include a payment decision.

legal_attribution_included.description: Must be false. This hook must not include a legal attribution decision.

ownership_decision_included.description: Must be false. This hook must not include an ownership decision.

automatic_execution_allowed.description: Must be false. This hook must not authorize automatic payment, attribution, contract execution, or ownership assignment.

human_review_required_before_payment.description: Must be true. Any payment decision requires a separate downstream process with human or policy review.

raw_content_stored.description: Must be false. Raw source content must not be stored inside the hook.

raw_query_stored.description: Must be false. Raw user queries must not be stored inside the hook.

raw_answer_stored.description: Must be false. Raw AI answers must not be stored inside the hook.

integrity.description: Optional integrity metadata for verifying the Royalty Hook and its relationship to the source graph.

source_graph_hash.description: Hash of the referenced Source Contribution Graph.

previous_hook_hash.description: Optional hash of a previous Royalty Hook for chained integrity.
